info.name: Jada Agent
info.summary: AI Agent powered by OpenClaw — autonomous tasks, skills, and MCP tools
info.description:
**Jada Agent** brings autonomous AI agent capabilities to your Nextcloud, powered by [OpenClaw](https://openclaw.ai).
### Features
- **Dashboard** — Real-time agent health, activity feed, and quick actions - **Chat** — Converse with your AI agent directly from Nextcloud - **Skills** — Manage installed skills and MCP server connections - **Schedules** — Create recurring or one-time automated jobs - **Settings** — Configure OpenClaw connection, model selection, and identity
### Requirements
- OpenClaw instance (self-hosted Docker container) - API key for your LLM provider (OpenRouter, Anthropic, OpenAI, etc.)
info.author: Garza OS
